title: Tradex
description: Search ItemExchange shop chests for sold/bought items
body:
# Tradex - Civ Trading Index

Find prices and shop locations for [ItemExchange](https://civwiki.org/wiki/Item_Exchange) shops.
When clicking on shops, the trades in chat are uploaded and shared with others using the mod.

![Screenshot of the search interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I12urDDP/images/17ff768070bc807827ee42364f43d0751c7a7185.png)

![Screenshot of highlighted trade chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I12urDDP/images/bf9865144c0b20443c5da40cc1d6142463571862.webp)

Inspired by [ZacStewart's CivTrade](https://github.com/zacstewart/civtrade-client/).
